name: Open in Glaxnimate
description: Open the animation in Glaxnimate (open-source Lottie editor). Watches the file; when saved, the modified Lottie is re-imported.
author: open-lottie-ui

wait_for_save.description: Block until the user saves; otherwise launch detached.

metadata.tooltip_warning: Glaxnimate is GPL-3.0. You install and run it; this app only invokes it. Output remains under your project's license.
